title: sutera tortuosa
intro: Sutera tortuosa, also known as the tortuosa woundwort, is a tropical plant species native to Southeast Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to promote wound healing and reduce inflammation. The leaves and roots of Sutera tortuosa contain bioactive compounds that exhibit anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities, providing health benefits such as wound healing, pain relief, and reduced risk of infection. Sutera tortuosa can be prepared into various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and topical creams, making it a versatile remedy for various health issues.
